key_facts: Global leader in distributed PV monitoring software
220 GW+ total capacity managed via platform
Founded 2013 (parent entity traces to 2009 in Wuxi, Jiangsu)
Listed entity: IGEN Tech Co., Ltd. (无锡英臻科技)
Platform: SOLARMAN Smart (end-user app) + SOLARMAN Business (installer/professional portal)
IoT-based: hardware data loggers (WiFi, 4G) + cloud analytics platform
As of Sept 2023: served installers in China, France, US, Italy, South Africa, India, Australia, Slovenia
De-facto industry standard for residential and C&I solar monitoring in China
business_model_notes: Two-sided platform: (1) hardware data loggers sold through inverter OEM partnerships (embedded in Growatt, Chint, Deye, Goodwe products); (2) SaaS subscription via SOLARMAN Business for professional installers. Revenue: hardware sales margin + SaaS license fees. Key network effect: each inverter OEM partnership brings thousands of residential users into the platform captively. Separate from Hoymiles S-Miles Cloud (microinverter-specific) and SolisCloud (Ginlong-specific) which are OEM-captive.
competitive_position: Independent monitoring leader vs OEM-captive competitors. SOLARMAN serves multiple OEM brands simultaneously, creating a cross-brand monitoring standard. Main threat: each major inverter OEM building its own captive platform (Sungrow iSolarCloud, Growatt ShinePhone, Ginlong SolisCloud). SOLARMAN's moat: installer loyalty + multi-brand compatibility.
research_notes: High confidence. Company website data verified. 220 GW and 190+ countries from SOLARMAN corporate profile (Sept 2023). 2.5M systems from company website. Business model details from SOLARMAN.cn installer portal documentation. Note: SOLARMAN-CN (domestic) listed separately in companies.yaml as geothermal-solarman-cn for its marketplace function.
